label: Surgery outcome effect
description: Defines the comp-based quality modifiers and concrete outcome list for a surgery. Referenced by RecipeDef via surgeryOutcomeEffect.

comps.label: Comps
comps.description: List of quality modifier comps evaluated to compute the final surgery quality. Each li element selects a comp class via the Class attribute.

outcomes.label: Outcomes
outcomes.description: List of possible surgery outcomes in ascending quality order. Each li element selects an outcome class via the Class attribute.

new-surgery-outcome-effect.label: New surgery outcome effect
new-surgery-outcome-effect.description: Minimal surgery outcome effect scaffold with empty comps and outcomes lists.
